Item 8.01
Other Events.
On
September 4, 2025, Flex Ltd.
filed a prospectus supplement to its automatic shelf registration statement on Form S-3 (File No. 333-281573) with
the Securities and Exchange Commission.
This
Current Report on Form 8-K is being filed solely for the purpose of filing the opinion of Allen & Gledhill LLP relating to the legality
of the shares covered by the prospectus supplement, which opinion is filed as Exhibit 5.1 hereto.
